'''Darius squad''' served at the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] on [[Taul/Legends|Taul]]. It was comprised of eleven veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] armed with [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbines]] and [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-axs]]. Darius squad participated in the [[Battle of Taul]] under the command of [[Maidtha Fait]] and had two [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] [[Specialist/Legends|specialists]].
